Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE_TOOLTIP_TEXT;
